quick_reference.logline: A dead heiress returns under a false name to reclaim her empire in public.
quick_reference.protagonist_snapshot: Nora weaponizes stillness, evidence, and spectacle.

world_background: The Hale family empire sits at the intersection of social prestige, donor politics, and corporate control. Public rooms matter because witness equals power.

timeline.event: Nora disappears after a staged accident tied to inheritance fraud.
Nora returns as Eva Stone to launch a public legitimacy war.

character_profiles.name: Nora Hale / Eva Stone
character_profiles.core_desire: Take back her name and company
character_profiles.core_fear: Being exposed before the evidence chain is complete
character_profiles.visual_design: dark formalwear, severe silhouette, minimal jewelry
character_profiles.relationship_notes: She dominates Celia in public and destabilizes Adrian through control.

location_profiles.name: Hale Charity Gala Ballroom
location_profiles.asset_notes: Must feel elite, expensive, and emotionally hostile.

prop_profiles.name: Amelia Hale Seal
prop_profiles.story_function: proof of lineage and evidence trigger
prop_profiles.visual_description: engraved family crest with aged metal patina

visual_system: The series language is cold luxury: black, crystal, gold, and precise silhouettes. Public spaces should feel weaponized by geometry and witness.
continuity_rules: Nora's scar is always on the same wrist.
Celia must always read brighter and more performative than Nora.
The family seal must visually match every mention of Hale lineage.

ai_asset_matrix.prompt_seed: female revenge heiress in black satin, cold luxury, high restraint

setting_bible_markdown:
# 04_<剧名>_英文设定集

## Quick Reference
- Project Title: Midnight Heiress
- Logline: A dead heiress returns under a false name to reclaim her empire in public.

## World Background
Public witness is power in the Hale world.

## Character Profiles
### CHAR-01 Nora Hale / Eva Stone
Cold luxury, severe silhouette, controlled speech.
